patch_scope: Added required AI node metadata: node_type, status, evidence, business_rule, last_updated, next_action.
Added required AI edge metadata: edge_type, status, evidence, business_rule, last_updated, next_action.
Embedded JSON-LD and machine-readable Graph JSON in the HTML.
Added HTML tooltip evidence and sidebar AI metadata panel.
Added export buttons for Graph JSON, JSON-LD, Audit Log, and Markdown summary.
Generated external graph_data.json, graph_data.jsonld, audit_log.json, summary.md, schema, SHACL, and XLSX report.

validation_summary.operational_truth_note: This graph is AI-ready semantic/evidence graph. It is not live operational truth until source-system evidence and Foundry Action write-back are approved.

review_notes: Operational status is not inferred as live logistics truth. PASS/AMBER here is graph AI-readiness/control status.
AMBER nodes indicate risk/control/guard concepts or insufficient source reference, not necessarily a failed shipment.
Inferred edges remain AMBER until source evidence is reviewed.
